boards.title: Boards
boards.description: Create, manage and organise your project boards. Use Kanban columns, drag-and-drop cards, set due dates, assign members, and track progress across all your projects in one place.

board.title: Kanban Board
board.description: The classic Kanban view: drag-and-drop cards between columns, set priorities, assign members, and track work-in-progress. Each column represents a stage in your workflow.

table.title: Table View
table.description: See all cards in a spreadsheet-style table. Sort, filter and scan columns like due date, assignee, labels and status at a glance. Ideal for bulk review and quick edits.

calendar.title: Calendar View
calendar.description: Visualise cards by their due dates on a calendar. Spot deadline clusters, plan upcoming work and ensure nothing slips through the cracks.

timeline.title: Timeline View
timeline.description: View cards on a Gantt-style timeline using their start and due dates. Great for understanding task duration, scheduling dependencies and project milestones.

boardOverview.title: Board Overview
boardOverview.description: A high-level snapshot of the selected board: card counts, completion rate, team workload, velocity metrics and AI-powered insights. Use it to quickly assess project health without diving into individual cards.

revenue.title: Revenue & Billing
revenue.description: Track financial performance for this board: milestone revenue, cost breakdown, profit margins, billable vs non-billable hours, and invoice status. This is the single source of truth for board-level finances.

scopeRadar.title: Scope Creep Radar
scopeRadar.description: Detects early warning signs of scope creep: cards exceeding planned time, unusual spikes in activity or edits, overdue tasks, and rising email volume. Severity levels help you prioritise which items need immediate attention.

moodSplit.title: Mood Split
moodSplit.description: Opens a mood board side panel next to your project board. Use it for visual references, design inspiration or client assets while you work on tasks, without switching between views.

boardMap.title: Board Map
boardMap.description: Manage the board's linked resources: Drive folder, connected email threads, team member permissions, and tracked websites. Everything about who and what is attached to this board, in one place.

settings.title: Board Settings
settings.description: Configure board preferences: name, background colour, default labels, member permissions, and Board Pro feature toggles. Changes here apply to this board only.

activity.title: Activity Log
activity.description: A chronological feed of everything that happened on this board: card moves, edits, comments, assignments, and status changes. Use it to audit who did what and when.

automations.title: Automations
automations.description: Set up rules that trigger automatically when conditions are met. Move cards, assign members, send notifications, or update fields without manual work.

emailRules.title: Email Rules
emailRules.description: Link incoming emails to cards automatically based on sender, subject or content rules. Keep email conversations and board tasks connected without manual effort.

financials.title: Financials
financials.description: Review the financial breakdown of this board: costs, revenue, and profit by card and milestone. Track budget utilisation and ensure the project stays on target.

crmExecutive.title: Executive Summary
crmExecutive.description: A cross-client financial overview: pipeline value, forecasted revenue, revenue per client, profit per project, time tracked vs billed, overdue invoices, and at-risk clients. The big picture of your business.

crmDashboard.title: CRM Dashboard
crmDashboard.description: Your central CRM hub showing deal counts, revenue breakdown, client health scores, recent activity, and key performance indicators. Monitor sales performance in real time.

crmInvoices.title: Invoices
crmInvoices.description: Create, edit and manage invoices for your clients. Track paid, unpaid and overdue invoices, send reminders, and link invoices to deals and board milestones.

crmPipeline.title: Sales Pipeline
crmPipeline.description: Visualise your sales funnel: drag deals between stages, track deal value, probability and expected close date. Identify bottlenecks and forecast revenue.

crmAutomation.title: Automation Rules
crmAutomation.description: Automate repetitive CRM actions: move deals between stages, send follow-up emails, update fields, or create tasks when specific conditions are met.

crmSequences.title: Email Sequences
crmSequences.description: Build multi-step email sequences that send automatically based on time delays or triggers. Nurture leads and follow up with clients on autopilot.

crmSharing.title: CRM Sharing
crmSharing.description: Control who on your team can view and manage CRM data. Set permissions for deals, invoices, and pipeline access by team member.

timeMyTime.title: My Time
timeMyTime.description: Your personal time tracked across all clients and activities. See how you spend your time on emails, boards, calendar events, documents and more. Filter by client or time period.

timeTeam.title: Team Time
timeTeam.description: See every team member's tracked time individually. Click on a colleague to drill down into their client and activity breakdown. Compare workloads and spot imbalances across the team.

timeCompany.title: Company Overview
timeCompany.description: Company-wide time overview with a utilisation matrix showing who spends time on which client. Includes a leaderboard, daily trend, and top clients by total hours across the entire organisation.
